name: RandomNumTable_0_F
desc: Random number table used for most sprite randomness, values range from 0-F

name: ZozoroPalette
desc: Has 2 graphics rows but only 1 palette row

name: IceBeamAbilityPalette
desc: Has 2 graphics rows but only 1 palette row

name: ClipdataBehaviorTypes_8000
desc: Clipdata behavior types for values over 0x8000

name: ClipdataCollisionTypes_8000
desc: Clipdata collision types for values over 0x8000

name: TankIncreaseAmounts
desc: Tank increase amounts for each difficulty (J and C only)

name: SineTable_1
desc: Used for wavy Samus graphics on pre-results screen

name: SineTable_2
desc: Unused?

name: SineTable_3
desc: Unused?

name: SineTables_Increasing
desc: Each table is 32 bytes, with heights from 0 to 64; potentially left over from WL4

name: AnimatedPaletteEntries
desc: J and C have 1 more entry, used for flashing numbers in sector connectors

name: Sector4_03_SpriteLayout2
desc: J and C only

name: BlockBg_Sector4_03_Bg2
desc: J and C remove middle path

name: Sector4_03_SpriteLayout1
desc: J and C have 1 less sprite

name: Sector4_03_SpriteLayout0
desc: J and C have 2 less sprites

name: NumTanksPerArea
desc: Last entry is total in all areas

name: DebugEventText
desc: Event names in the pause screen debug menu

name: TitleScreenDebugText
desc: Blank in release versions

name: MinimapDataPtrs
desc: Last entry is all 0s to mark end of list

name: HiraganaPauseScreenTextPtrs
desc: J has 3 more entries
